source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain, pre-1928)
title: Steamer 'Queen' at Haines Mission, Alaska, en route to the Klondyke
description: 1898 stereograph showing the steamship Queen anchored at Haines Mission with Klondike gold rush passengers aboard, the Chilkat Range rising across Lynn Canal. Haines served as a jumping-off point for the Dalton Trail route to the Klondike gold fields.
alt: 1898 stereograph of the steamship Queen at Haines Mission during the Klondike Gold Rush
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from loc.gov storage-services (stereo 1s49633) and visually confirmed
